channel.title: Glyphosate on VitaminDWiki
channel.description: Recent content in Glyphosate on VitaminDWiki

item.title: Glyphosate (Roundup) increases risk of NH lymphoma by 41 percent – meta-analysis
Glyphosate (Roundup) kills both weeds and the microbes in your gut that produce Folate
item.description:
This Go-To Strategy Helps Your Body Sweep Away Glyphosate and Heavy Metals… and Provides Your Cells With a B Vitamin They Can’t Live Without Mercola

  • “They claim that the mechanism by which it kills weeds, called the shikimate pathway, doesn’t exist in humans and animals. However, this pathway is present in bacteria . And every cell in your body has its own microbes and all of them have the shikimate pathway and respond to glyphosate!”

item.title: Impossible burger has an impossible amount of Glyphosate – 11 ppb
item.description:
• The fake food race is worth $3 trillion
      • See also web

The fake food race is worth $3 trillion

Mercola

  • “… animal studies show 0.1 ppb of glyphosate can alter function of more than 4,000 liver and kidney genes and cause organ damage”

See also web

  • All the Different Alternative Meats You Can Throw on Your Grill, Explained July 2019

    • “Impossible Burger is high in Omega-6 fatty acids” - which cause inflamation and block healthful Omega-3s

item.title: Peanut and Food allergies prevented by Vitamin D
item.description:
Summary (based on data below and many other Vitamin D studies)

Known:     Low vitamin D while pregnant or as a child or due to poor Vitamin D genes is associated with Food Allergies

Suspected:     One or more environmental stressors (such as Roundup) cause the food allergy if low level of vitamin D

Anticipated:     Increasing Vitamin D levels while pregnant or as a child will PREVENT Food Allergies

Possible:     Increasing Vitamin D levels will TREAT a food allergic child

item.title: Glyphosate Is Causing Fatty Liver Disease and many other problems
item.description:
Glyphosate Is Causing Fatty Liver Disease Mercola May 2019

  • “Researchers from King’s College London also showed an “ultra low dose” of glyphosate-based herbicides was damaging to the liver”

    • “The study involved glyphosate exposures of 4 nanograms per kilogram of body weight per day, which is 75,000 and 437,500 times below EU and U.S. permitted levels, respectively”

  • “Those with a more severe form of NAFLD called nonalcoholic steatohepatitis, or NASH, had significantly higher residues of glyphosate in their urine….”

item.title: Low Vitamin D is one of the causes of oxidative stress and aging
item.description:
Vitamin D, Oxidative Stress, and Aging

Sunil Wimalawansa

This article is associated with the MDPI-Biology special Journal article,

“Vitamin D Deficiency: Effects on Oxidative Stress, Epigenetics, Gene Regulation, and Aging.”

Download the FULL version PDF from VitaminDWiki

Which includes the following graphic

Sunil J. Wimalawansa, MD, PhD, MBA, FRCP, FACP, FACE, FRCPath, DSc

Professor of Medicine, Endocrinology & Nutrition; Cardiometabolic & Endocrine Institute, North Brunswick, NJ, USA; suniljw@hotmail.com

Drugs

item.title: Another verdict: Roundup caused cancer, 11,200 more cases to be tried
item.description:
Monsanto Weedkiller Roundup Was ‘Substantial Factor’ in Causing Man’s Cancer, Jury Says New York Times

  • “We feel confident based on the evidence that a jury, when presented with all of the evidence, will see that Monsanto has committed 40 years of corporate malfeasance ,”

  • “Ms. Moore said the verdict would likely influence the thousands of other similar cases — about 11,200 people had sued Monsanto over Roundup as of February, according to Bayer.”

item.title: Glyphosate use in nearby farm increased chance of death by Parkinson’s patients by a third
item.description:
See also web

  • GLYPHOSATE BINDS VITAL NUTRIENTS 2010?

“Glyphosate binds (chelates) vital nutrients such as iron, manganese, zinc, and boron in the soil, preventing plants from taking them up”

" Due to its strong metal chelating properties, glyphosate was initially used as a descaling agent to clean out calcium and other mineral deposit s in pipes and boilers of residential and commercial hot water systems."

Download the PDF from VitaminDWiki

item.title: Soy associated with food allergies in mice (perhaps Roundup)
item.description:
Mouse Chow Composition Influences Immune Responses and Food Allergy Development in a Mouse Model.

Nutrients. 2018 Nov 16;10(11). pii: E1775. doi: 10.3390/nu10111775.

Weidmann E1, Samadi N2, Klems M3, Heiden D4, Seppova K5, Ret D6,7, Untersmayr E8.

Roundup was not mentioned in the study

  • GMO soybeans have high levels of glyphosate – June 2014

item.title: Some cereals have 12X more Glyphosate than Vitamin D
item.description:
Tests Reveal More Weed Killer Than Some Vitamins in Kids’ Cereals EWG

“…EWG has released the results of laboratory tests that found glyphosate widespread in oat-based breakfast cereals and snack bars popular with kids. The vast majority of the non-organic products analyzed – 85 percent – had levels of the weed killer above EWG’s health benchmark of 160 parts per billion, or ppb.”

Thus 85% of oat cereals and snack bars had > 0.160 ppm Glyphosate

item.title: Reasons for Low Vitamin D and what to do
item.description:
Cause of low Vitamin D Option if unable
to change the cause
((Pesticides increase risk of Cancers, Alz, ALS, Asthma, ADHD, etc. (all related to low vitamin D) – Oct 2016 Pesticides)) ( ((Investigation on Roundup - glyphosate at VitaminDWiki
((Smoking reduces vitamin D - many studies Smoking))
1st, 2nd, 3rd hand
((Off Topic: Organic food consumption decreases cancer by 25 percent – JAMA Oct 2018 Non-organic food))
pesticides, less Mg, Boron,
((Air Pollution reduces Vitamin D Pollution))/Smog
Lack of sunshine Increase D
((Antibiotics, probiotics Antibiotics))
((Statins and Vitamin D - many studies Statins))
((Trauma and surgery Stress – Trauma))
Stress – Emotions Increase D
((Cola Soft Drinks reduce Calcium and vitamin D Soft drink)) - decreases Calcium
((Overview Magnesium and vitamin D Low Magnesium))
((Vitamin D Receptor Genes restrict Vitamin D))
in blood getting to cells
Poor Gut Gut-friendly Vitamin D
Poor Liver
Poor Kidney
((Gallbladder removal and vitamin D deficiency No Gallbladder))
((Season of Birth Born in the wrong season))
Or mother had low vitamin D
((Overview Dark Skin and Vitamin D Dark Skin))
((Overview Obesity and Vitamin D Obese))
((Overview Seniors and Vitamin D Elderly))
(less from the gut and less from skin)

Ways to increase D
